subcodes.first_line: O Rayhan! God willing, mayest thou, with utmost joy and fragrance, be eloquent in praise of the All-Merciful and become renowned through His love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ریحان انشاء الله بکمال روح و ریحان بذکر رحمن ناطق باشی و بحبش مشهور و مذکور
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual transformation
